name: Super Mario
description: Nintendo's flagship Mario franchise, covering mainline platformers and closely related Mario branches.

eras.title: Arcade Foundation
eras.description: Donkey Kong and Mario Bros. establish Mario before the mainline platforming formula.

eras.title: Classic 2D Era
eras.description: NES, Game Boy, and SNES platformers define Mario as Nintendo's flagship.

eras.title: 3D Transition Era
eras.description: Mario 64 and Sunshine establish open 3D Mario.

eras.title: Galaxy and Modern 2D Era
eras.description: Parallel growth of linear 3D Mario and New Super Mario Bros.

eras.title: Sandbox Revival Era
eras.description: Modern Mario led by Odyssey, Wonder, and Switch-era consolidation.
